title: T-041 — Request Review Modal (request_review_modal) — PLE-010
prompt:
# T-041 — Request Review Modal

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §17.1 PLE-010, §16.2 OQ-EXT-04
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:677-696 (`request_review_modal`)
UX: design/07-PLANNING-EXT-UX.md:522
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement Dialog opened from BLOCKED matrix cell — Planner submits justification (≥10 chars) → INSERT matrix_review_request + outbox event changeover_matrix.review.requested.

## Implementation contract
1. New `apps/web/src/components/matrix/RequestReviewModal.tsx` (shadcn Dialog).
2. Dynamic title `{allergen_from} → {allergen_to}`.
3. Mandatory justification Textarea ≥10 chars (zod min(10)).
4. Submit → Server Action → INSERT matrix_review_request (T-007) + emit outbox changeover_matrix.review.requested.
5. Partial unique enforced server-side (T-007); UI shows toast 'A pending request already exists' on 409.

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/RequestReviewModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/request-review-action.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/__tests__/RequestReviewModal.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given justification length 5, when [Submit] clicked, then submit blocked with field error 'Minimum 10 characters'
2. Given the rendered modal, when compared to prototype design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:677-696, then it has same title format, same Textarea, same Submit/Cancel buttons, and same shadcn primitives (Dialog, Textarea, Button, Label) — parity by RTL snapshot + checklist
3. Given a pending request already exists for (tenant, from, to, line_id), when [Submit] runs, then 409 toast 'A pending request already exists' shown

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/RequestReviewModal.test.tsx covering min-10 + parity + 409 partial unique handling
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test matrix/RequestReviewModal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow submit with justification <10 chars
- Do not skip outbox emit (admin notification depends on it)
- Do not bypass partial unique on (allergen_from, allergen_to, line_id) WHERE status='pending'

pipeline_inputs.description: Dialog submitting matrix_review_request with justification ≥10 chars + outbox emit + 409 handling on duplicate pending.
pipeline_inputs.details: Zod min(10) on justification. Server Action inserts row + emits outbox. UI maps 409 to toast.
out_of_scope: Do not implement admin Tab 3 review queue here (covered by editor T-036)

Given a pending request already exists, when [Submit] runs, then 409 toast 'A pending request already exists' shown
